title: Tea Barista (Part-time)
description:
Singapore Heytea Management Pte Ltd is a leading tea brand that specialises in innovative and delicious tea-based beverages. With a focus on high-quality ingredients and exceptional customer service, we are dedicated to providing our customers with a unique and memorable tea experience. As a growing company, we are constantly seeking talented individuals to join our team!

Working Hour:

  • Flexible hours (minimum commitment required)
  • Includes weekends and public holidays

Responsibilities:

  • Prepare tea and beverages according to company recipes and quality standards.
  • Provide friendly and efficient customer service.
  • Take orders and handle cash / POS transactions accurately.
  • Maintain cleanliness and hygiene of the workstation.
  • Follow food hygiene and safety regulations at all times.
  • Answer incoming calls and handle delivery orders accurately and promptly.
  • Work as a team to ensure smooth daily operations.

Qualifications:

  • No experience required; training will be provided.
  • Able to work in a fast-paced environment.
  • Willing to stand for long hours and perform light physical work.
  • Positive attitude, responsible, and team-oriented.
  • Able to communicate in basic English or Chinese to meet the business needs of the company.

Bonus:

  • Prior F&B or customer service experience is an advantage.
  • Candidates with Food Hygiene Cert will be an added advantage.
  • Short notice period or can start immediately will be preferred.

What We Offer:

  • Drinks Vouchers
  • A collaborative and inclusive team culture

postedCompany.description:
Guided by the core spirit of “cool,” we start with inspiration and uphold natural ingredients as our standard. We craft every cup of tea with pride, creating products that reflect authenticity and innovation. Rooted in the philosophy of tea and Zen, we continuously explore richer expressions of flavor, culture, and experience.
We hope to reimagine tea through creativity — building not only a global beverage brand, but a meaningful cultural symbol.

In 2018, we took our first step abroad in Singapore, marking the beginning of our journey to connect with the world.

In 2023, we continued expanding globally, sharing the natural fragrance of tea across borders. Today, HEYTEA has entered eight countries, bringing modern Chinese tea culture to the world in a cooler, younger, and more inspiring form.

HEYTEA now spans over 330 cities worldwide, with more than 4,000 stores globally, and continues to grow with the belief that tea can be a universal language of lifestyle, inspiration, and creativity.
postedCompany.name: SINGAPORE HEYTEA MANAGEMENT PTE. LTD.
